2360.reason: [This line incorrectly decrements the token position, causing the parser to reprocess the same identifier token. This leads to infinite loops or incorrect parsing because parsePrimaryExp() will call parseLVal() which expects to consume an IDENFR token, but the position has been artificially moved back. The correct approach is to not decrement pos and instead create an LVal directly from the already consumed identifier.]
